task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the 'Northwind Traders' business in Manager.io.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manager.io interface should display 'Northwind Traders' as the active business at the top or in the breadcrumb navigation.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to create a new receipt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Receipt' form or screen should be visible in the Manager.io interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the receipt is being created for the 'Cash on Hand' account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Bank or Cash Account' (or similar account dropdown) field on the receipt form should have 'Cash on Hand' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that the payer is set to 'Walk-in Customer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Payer' or 'Customer' field on the receipt form should contain the text 'Walk-in Customer'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the line item is 'Chai' with a quantity of 12.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the line items section of the receipt, 'Chai' should be selected as the Item, and the 'Qty' (Quantity) field should be set to 12.

task_completion.description: Verify that the receipt was successfully saved or created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A view of the completed/saved receipt, or the Receipts list showing the newly created transaction for 'Walk-in Customer' with the correct total.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Manager.io web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands (like curl) making API requests.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Manager.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the authentic Manager.io layout, menus, and styling, not a text editor or a mocked-up spreadsheet.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show sqlite3 commands or script executions directly modifying the Manager.io data files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct business is 'Northwind Traders'. The receipt must be created under the 'Cash on Hand' account. The payer must be 'Walk-in Customer'. The line item must be 'Chai' with a quantity of exactly 12.
